  Thanks for contributing to Hondana! Please fill out this template.
  Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR is easiest to review.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear description of the change and WHY it's needed. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Link the issue this addresses. -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] ⚡ Performance
- [ ] 🧪 Tests
- [ ] 🔧 Build / CI / chore

## Screenshots / recording

<!-- For UI changes, add before/after screenshots or a short recording. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format.
- [ ] I read and followed the project rules in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.
- [ ] `dart format lib` produced no changes.
- [ ] `flutter analyze` reports **No issues found!**
- [ ] `flutter test` passes.
- [ ] I updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` where relevant.
